title: subscribe_events: return BoxStream not impl Stream
description:
## Why

subscribe_events currently returns impl futures::Stream + Send inside a Result. impl Trait in library return position means callers cannot name or store the type. Every long-lived JMAP client (background tasks, app state structs, reconnection loops) must write Box::pin(stream) manually. That friction belongs in the library, not in every caller.

## What needs to be done

Change the return type to futures::stream::BoxStream<'static, Result<SseFrame, ClientError>>. Add .boxed() at the end of the stream pipeline inside the function body. Update any tests that rely on the concrete return type.
